title: sceptridium biternatum
intro: Sceptridium biternatum, also known as the Chinese episperm or twin-veined episperm, is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the family Liliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sceptridium biternatum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and leaves are often dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
